testcase.name: test_loyalty_stats_admin

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('total_members' in {'config': {'multipliers': {'free': 1.0, 'pawsome': 1.5, 'premium': 2.0, 'vip': 3.0}, 'points_per_10_rupees': 1, 'redemption_value': 0.5}, 'potential_liability': 250.0, 'recent_transactions': [{'adjusted_by': 'aditya', 'created_at': '2026-01-14T04:52:34.610207+00:00', 'id': 'lpt-a54408622e89', 'points': 500, ...}], 'top_users': [{'email': 'test@example.com', 'loyalty_points': 500, 'membership_tier': 'free', 'name': 'Test User'}], ...} or 'members' in {'config': {'multipliers': {'free': 1.0, 'pawsome': 1.5, 'premium': 2.0, 'vip': 3.0}, 'points_per_10_rupees': 1, 'redemption_value': 0.5}, 'potential_liability': 250.0, 'recent_transactions': [{'adjusted_by': 'aditya', 'created_at': '2026-01-14T04:52:34.610207+00:00', 'id': 'lpt-a54408622e89', 'points': 500, ...}], 'top_users': [{'email': 'test@example.com', 'loyalty_points': 500, 'membership_tier': 'free', 'name': 'Test User'}], ...})

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_orders_autoship_routes.py:317: in test_loyalty_stats_admin assert "total_members" in data or "members" in data E AssertionError: assert ('total_members' in {'config': {'multipliers': {'free': 1.0, 'pawsome': 1.5, 'premium': 2.0, 'vip': 3.0}, 'points_per_10_rupees': 1, 'redemption_value': 0.5}, 'potential_liability': 250.0, 'recent_transactions': [{'adjusted_by': 'aditya', 'created_at': '2026-01-14T04:52:34.610207+00:00', 'id': 'lpt-a54408622e89', 'points': 500, ...}], 'top_users': [{'email': 'test@example.com', 'loyalty_points': 500, 'membership_tier': 'free', 'name': 'Test User'}], ...} or 'members' in {'config': {'multipliers': {'free': 1.0, 'pawsome': 1.5, 'premium': 2.0, 'vip': 3.0}, 'points_per_10_rupees': 1, 'redemption_value': 0.5}, 'potential_liability': 250.0, 'recent_transactions': [{'adjusted_by': 'aditya', 'created_at': '2026-01-14T04:52:34.610207+00:00', 'id': 'lpt-a54408622e89', 'points': 500, ...}], 'top_users': [{'email': 'test@example.com', 'loyalty_points': 500, 'membership_tier': 'free', 'name': 'Test User'}], ...})
